cards.front: What is a balanced binary search tree
cards.back: A binary tree that satisfies the properties: left child of a node has a height less than or equal to the right child of its parent node

cards.front: What is the height of a binary tree
cards.back: The maximum number of edges on the longest path from the root to a leaf node
A specialized binary tree where the parent node is either greater than (max heap) or less than (min heap) its child nodes

cards.front: What is the property of a min heap
cards.back: The value of the parent node is less than its child nodes
A comparison-based sorting algorithm that uses a heap data structure to sort elements in order
